description_long: This is a pair of open-toe, slip-on heeled sandals featuring a vibrant, multicolored woven upper strap with a floral or abstract pattern. The base and heel are a solid coral-pink color, with a moderate heel height and a slightly flared heel base for stability. The insole appears to be lightly cushioned and is also coral-pink, with a white strip running along the length for added visual interest. The outsole is black, providing contrast and likely added grip. The overall design is summery and stylish, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban outings. The shoes appear to be in pristine, unused condition with no visible signs of wear.
description: A pair of coral-pink, open-toe heeled sandals with a multicolored woven upper strap and a moderate heel, featuring a summery, vibrant design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the flared coral-pink heels and the arch of the multicolored woven straps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the moderate heel height, the full length of the coral-pink sole, and the colorful upper strap.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open-toe design and the broad, patterned woven straps across the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the heel and the woven strap from a different angle.
